chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.488 of 2020 __________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) __________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1625/2021 2. For hearing of main case. 02.09.2021 Mr. Shahab Sarki Advocate for the Petitioner along with Applicant ------------ Although applicant has filed this Reference Application on a question that over and above US Dollars 10,000/- at the most is likely to be involved. In view of facts and circumstances of the case and perhaps the order of the Tribunal also provides that an amount of US Dollars 10,000/- also be released to the applicant being permissible in accordance with law. On instructions Mr. Sarki does not press this Reference Application accordingly, the judgment of the Tribunal be complied in letter and spirit if not challenged by the Respondents before appropriate forum. Reference Application is not pressed and is dismissed alongwith pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/PA
